creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 165271
patch 1: build infrastructure

I am planning to import LLVM's libunwind for exception unwinding and would like to request an exp-run. This is probably a bigger run-time than build-time concern, in fact, but it's important to at least start here and make sure that it doesn't introduce a build breakage.

Currently two patches are required:
1. LLVM-libunwind build infrastructure
   (attached as llvm-libunwind-x86-arm.diff and also https://reviews.freebsd.org/D4787)
2. enable LLVM-libunwind on x86 and arm by default
   (attached as llvm-libunwind.diff)
